sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30308" key="e)gklhsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκλησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30308.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blame, adverse criticism</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Arist.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.14</biblScope> </bibl> W.</sense> </entryFree>
